description: QuickChart is a web service for generating static chart and QR/barcode images from HTTP requests. It is used to render Chart.js charts and related assets for emails, reports, automation, and other environments without client-side rendering.
summary: QuickChart exposes one HTTP API, documented by an OpenAPI spec at `https://quickchart.io/openapi.json`, covering chart rendering, QR generation, QR batch generation, QR reading, validation, and natural-language chart config generation; no GraphQL, MCP server, or first-party CLI surfaced.
